added: Kubernetes storage detection — IMS NAS imports now detect storage volumes consumed by IKS/ROKS clusters (via PVC, storageclass, and plugin metadata in notes). Detected volumes are flagged with _isKubeStorage and excluded from migration assessment since they migrate with the cluster. A new storage-kube-consumed pre-requisite check lists affected volumes with cluster ID and PVC name
K8s storage warning banner on Block Storage and File Storage resource tables when Kubernetes-consumed volumes are present
Hidden 'K8s Storage' column on block and file storage tables (opt-in via column settings)

Curated Classic-to-VPC profile mapping — migration assessment now uses 266 VSI profiles and 42 bare metal profiles (including Gen4: bx4, cx4, mx4) imported from IBM's Classic-to-VPC mapping spreadsheets, with hourly pricing

Spreadsheet-first bare metal mapping — 666 explicit Classic bare metal configurations (by processor, cores, RAM, and storage category) mapped to recommended VPC VSI or bare metal profiles, with algorithmic fallback for unmatched servers
Enriched storage tier mappings — block and file storage Classic-to-VPC tier mappings, throughput/IOPS ranges, and per-zone pricing from IBM's storage migration reference data

Disk utilization in XLSX export — the four disk utilization columns (Disk Used %, Disk Used / Total, Disk Util Status, Disk Util Details) are now included in the vVirtualServers and vBareMetal worksheets when exporting to XLSX

PowerVS and Platform Services XLSX import — the Import XLSX feature now recognises PowerVS worksheets (pPvs* prefix) and Platform Services worksheets (sServiceInstances), routing imported data to the correct domain contexts

Disk Utilization Collection (opt-in) — SSH into Classic VSIs and Bare Metal servers via private IP to collect real filesystem usage. New Phase 5 runs after all API collection with 5 concurrent SSH connections and 10s timeout
Enriched OS compatibility data — expanded from 18 to 43 OS entries with EOL dates, VPC image type, and detailed migration notes
New os-unsupported migration blocker check — flags servers running operating systems that cannot run on VPC at all
BYOL awareness in compute analysis — migration notes now indicate when an OS is only available as a BYOL custom image on VPC
Platform Services domain — new fourth infrastructure tab that collects all IBM Cloud service instances via the Resource Controller API
Cloud-harvester schema alignment — attached network storage fields on Virtual Servers and Bare Metal
VMware Cross References frontend table definition
Migration execution step templates per approach — structured guidance for lift-and-shift, rebuild, re-platform, and re-architect
Windows Cloudbase-Init & VirtIO pre-requisite check
VPC Network ACL rule estimate check — warns when Classic firewall rules exceed VPC NACL limits
Documentation links on all 12 feature gap definitions
Expanded Classic-to-VPC migration links in Help docs
Migration approach recommendation per workload — classifies each VSI and Bare Metal as Lift & Shift, Rebuild, Re-platform, or Re-architect
6 new migration pre-requisite checks: VRF Enablement, Reserved Capacity, Storage Utilization, Software Add-on Detection, GPU Workload Detection, and migration approach classification
Software Add-ons feature gap entry in Feature Gap Analysis
Post-migration troubleshooting section in Help docs
Expanded IBM migration resource links
VRF Enablement migration pre-requisite check
Storage discovery gaps closed — portable storage distinction, file storage bytesUsed, hasEncryptionAtRest, per-volume snapshot collection
9 new migration pre-requisite checks: 32-bit OS, unsupported OS, EOL OS, hypervisor detection, Oracle/SAP workload detection, IKS/ROKS worker node detection, single-socket high clock speed
IMS report import — CSV, HTML, drawio, XLSX, MDL, and JSON parsers with multi-source merger
Error boundaries, guided tour, export page, retry logic
Collection timeout (10 min) and SSE keepalive (30s) on all collection streams
CI npm audit step and Trivy container image scan
In-app About page with changelog
changed: Auth routes refactored — IAM helpers extracted to shared utils/iam.ts, Zod request validation added
MDL parser improved — field renames, nested dict resolution, gateway IP extraction
Deploy script rewritten with .env loading, podman support, create-or-update pattern
CI/CD deploy workflow: use us.icr.io registry, target resource group, create-or-update app pattern
fixed: ApiKeyForm test failures — added missing mocks for ImportReportButton and ImportMdlButton
blockDevices crash on IMS report import guarded with Array.isArray
Replaced abandoned react-simple-maps with d3-geo for React 19 compatibility

added: Initial release — IBM Cloud Infrastructure Explorer
Classic infrastructure collection (27+ resource types)
VPC collection (26 resource types across all regions)
PowerVS collection (22 resource types across all workspaces)
Interactive tables with column picker, filtering, sorting, virtualization
XLSX export with one worksheet per resource type
XLSX import for re-loading previously exported data
Dashboard with resource counts, distribution charts, account info
Cost analysis with treemap and sunburst visualizations
Geography map showing resource distribution across datacenters
Network topology diagram with relationship mapping
VPC migration assessment with pre-requisite checks
OAuth 2.0 PKCE and IAM passcode login flows
VSI Profile Selection Guide with flowchart
Docker multi-stage build for IBM Code Engine deployment
GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline
